overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from a cyberpunk-style game, showing a character walking through a rain-soaked futuristic city street with neon signs and digital billboards, then turning into a narrow graffiti-covered alleyway. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, dystopian architecture, and atmospheric neon lighting.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked futuristic commercial street with green-tinted buildings on the left and large digital billboards on the right. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights overhead as pedestrians pass by, including a figure with a purple umbrella and a worker in a safety vest who turns and exits left.

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the street with industrial buildings on the right featuring graffiti and large windows. The camera approaches a crosswalk area with a tall twisted tower visible in the hazy background, passing vertical neon advertisements on the left building facade while following a pedestrian in dark clothing.

segments.scene_description: Turning right into a narrow, enclosed alleyway with walls covered in purple and green graffiti. The camera moves past piles of trash bags and cardboard debris toward a dark underpass area with an abandoned vehicle visible in the distance, transitioning from the open street to a claustrophobic service corridor with concrete support pillars.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-lit commercial thoroughfare into the claustrophobic depths of a gritty urban alleyway. It begins by gliding along a rain-soaked street where green-tinted buildings and glowing digital billboards reflect off the wet pavement, passing pedestrians including a figure with a purple umbrella. As the camera continues forward, the environment shifts toward a more industrial aesthetic with graffiti-covered walls and vertical advertisements, revealing a tall twisted tower looming through the hazy background. The scene then turns right, leaving the open street behind to enter a narrow service corridor enclosed by purple and green graffiti. Finally, the camera moves past piles of trash and cardboard debris toward a dark underpass and an abandoned vehicle, transitioning into a dim space defined by heavy concrete support pillars.
